# License and Usage

**Sell the Client Docs You Already Use**

---

## What You Can Do

**Personal use:**
You may use all documents in this kit to build and launch your own paid templates.
The tools, frameworks, and AI prompts are designed to be filled in and adapted
for your own client documents and your own Gumroad products.

**Adapting the content:**
You may adapt the included templates, frameworks, and prompts to fit your niche,
your clients, and your products. The goal is for you to end up with something
that sounds like you — not a copy of this kit.

---

## What You Cannot Do

**Reselling this kit:**
You may not resell, share, or redistribute this kit or any of its individual files —
whether modified or unmodified — as a standalone product or bonus.

**Sharing the files:**
You may not share the downloaded files with others, including colleagues,
team members, or clients. Each purchase is for one user.

**Using this as a template pack to resell directly:**
You may not take the included document templates (e.g., the intake form structure,
the Gumroad page template, the email sequence) and sell them as-is without
meaningful adaptation. The kit is designed to help you create your own products —
not to be repackaged and sold as-is.

**AI training:**
You may not use the content of this kit to train AI models or language models.

---

## What Happens After You Adapt the Content

Once you have adapted the tools to create your own client document template
and written your own Gumroad listing, your resulting product is yours.
You own the templates you create.

This license covers only the raw kit content — not the products you create using it.

---

## Questions

If you're unsure whether a specific use case is allowed, email {{SUPPORT_EMAIL}}.
I'll give you a straight answer.

---

## Summary

| Action | Allowed? |
|---|---|
| Using the kit for your own template business | Yes |
| Adapting the AI prompts for your niche | Yes |
| Creating and selling your own templates using this system | Yes |
| Reselling this kit | No |
| Sharing the files with others | No |
| Selling the included templates without meaningful adaptation | No |
| Using the content to train AI models | No |
